tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Pinned adapter dependency installation, module verification, vet, unit tests, race tests, reproducible linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 builds, daemon, MCP and worker smokes, 55 Python tests, and repository validation passed after the final review fix.

tests.name: final reviewed implementation pull-request workflow
tests.summary: The final reviewed PR tree passed repository quality, PostgreSQL durability, deterministic index and rollback rehearsals, durable restart, and clean observability-stack rehearsal.

tests.name: exact final public implementation workflow
tests.summary: The exact squash-merged public implementation passed the complete protected workflow on a clean Linux host.

tests.name: fresh-database PostgreSQL integration and rollback suite
tests.database: PostgreSQL 14.19 local corroboration; PostgreSQL 18.3 is proven by protected CI
coverage: Migration 008 authority, lifecycle, append-only, and semantic-delta constraints
tenant and repository isolation, concurrent replay, receipts, events, outbox, and artifact binding
real committed-Git indexing with Go, TypeScript, and Python adapters
selective dependency reuse and configuration-only invalidation
real Git delivery, crash recovery, and durable restart
Sprint 08 rollback to the authoritative Sprint 07 implementation

tests.name: real deterministic indexing command drill
tests.summary: Four snapshots across two repository authorities produced four canonical receipts; Go and TypeScript were safely reused, Python was re-extracted, and a go.mod-only change forced Go re-extraction.

tests.name: Sprint 07 rollback target rehearsal
tests.summary: Migration 008 rolled back only after proving Sprint 08 canonical state empty, and the exact Sprint 07 binary passed against the downgraded schema.
